tool.name: batch_http_get
tool.description:
Execute up to 50 parallel HTTP GETs as a single tool call.
Replaces chains of individual terminal_execute + curl when probing many URLs (recon sweeps, IDOR sweeps across user IDs, directory bruteforce, shadow endpoint discovery). Returns per-URL status, size, body_preview. Caps at 50 per call.
Example: checking 40 candidate admin paths in one call instead of 40 separate curl invocations — faster AND saves tokens.

parameter.name: urls
parameter.description: Up to 50 absolute URLs to probe.

parameter.name: return_body_preview
parameter.description: Chars of body to return per URL. Default 200.
